name: Muelsyse (Feat. Magallan) - Snow Halation (Arknights)
description:
Time seems to fly when I'm by your side...

You've been in a relationship with Muelsyse for a while now. And right now, you're spending christmas alone with her, in her fancy apartment in Trimounts, overlooking the city and its lights, protected from the cold in a comfy place you can call home.

Right as you're coming back from the kitchen with some hot chocolate, you see that Magallan called Mumu, and thus, the night isn't so quiet anymore. Nothing special has to happen tonight. After all, a holiday is meant to be enjoyed in peace, isn't it?

Art source.

Bot theme song: Snow Halation (Will Stetson acoustic cover) (Youtube version here!)

Wow. Today marks TWO YEARS since I started JanitorAI. I'm speechless, really. Two whole years passed by with this being my main hobby. I already did a sappy wall of text thanking everyone for the support and fun interactions so far, so I won't do it again. I just want to say, I don't plan on quitting anytime soon. Even though things will get much harder from now on, I'll try my best to continue giving you guys high-effort bots.
creator: ZenMode
